skillsSnapshot.prompt:
The following skills provide specialized instructions for specific tasks.
Use the read tool to load a skill's file when the task matches its description.
When a skill file references a relative path, resolve it against the skill directory (parent of SKILL.md / dirname of the path) and use that absolute path in tool commands.

<available_skills>
  <skill>
    <name>ai-tech-radar</name>
    <description>|</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/ai-tech-radar/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>alert-analysis</name>
    <description>告警分析工具。通过自然语言描述，自动查询星火告警数据并进行分析。
支持按时间范围、告警类型筛选，输出告警趋势、分布、TOP N 等分析结论。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/alert-analysis/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>coding-agent</name>
    <description>Delegate coding tasks to Codex, Claude Code, or Pi agents via background process. Use when: (1) building/creating new features or apps, (2) reviewing PRs (spawn in temp dir), (3) refactoring large codebases, (4) iterative coding that needs file exploration. NOT for: simple one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code (use read tool), thread-bound ACP harness requests in chat (for example spawn/run Codex or Claude Code in a Discord thread; use sessions_spawn with runtime:"acp"), or any work in ~/clawd workspace (never spawn agents here). Claude Code: use --print --permission-mode bypassPermissions (no PTY). Codex/Pi/OpenCode: pty:true required.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/coding-agent/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>cursor-team</name>
    <description>Cursor Team Analytics 数据采集与分析。通过已登录的浏览器访问 Cursor 团队分析页面， 按账号维度提取 AI 代码贡献率和仓库级别数据。 触发词: "cursor-team", "cursor analytics", "cursor 分析", "AI使用率", "ai-committed"。 触发示例: "cursor-team 生成近7天AI使用率分析", "cursor-team 7 ai-committed", "使用cursor-team生成近30天分析", "cursor-team 近7天"。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/cursor-team/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>healthcheck</name>
    <description>Host security hardening and risk-tolerance configuration for OpenClaw deployments. Use when a user asks for security audits, firewall/SSH/update hardening, risk posture, exposure review, OpenClaw cron scheduling for periodic checks, or version status checks on a machine running OpenClaw (laptop, workstation, Pi, VPS).</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/healthcheck/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>node-connect</name>
    <description>Diagnose OpenClaw node connection and pairing failures for Android, iOS, and macOS companion apps. Use when QR/setup code/manual connect fails, local Wi-Fi works but VPS/tailnet does not, or errors mention pairing required, unauthorized, bootstrap token invalid or expired, gateway.bind, gateway.remote.url, Tailscale, or plugins.entries.device-pair.config.publicUrl.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/skills/node-connect/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>savechat</name>
    <description>Archive current session to sessions.json so it appears in the session list. Use when the user says "savechat", "save chat", "保存对话", "归档对话", or wants to save/archive the current conversation before starting a new one.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/savechat/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>screenshot</name>
    <description>MacOS screenshot capture tool. Use when: user asks to take screenshots, capture screen regions, or save screenshots to files.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/screenshot/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>session-sync</name>
    <description>Sync OpenClaw sessions to a GitHub repository for seamless continuation across different machines. Use when the user says "save-session", "save-all-session", "session-list", "update-session", "update-all-session", "merge-session", "delete-session", "sync session", "备份会话", "同步会话", "删除会话", or wants to push/pull/delete session data to/from GitHub. NOT for: general git operations, file syncing, or other backup tasks.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/session-sync/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>skill-creator</name>
    <description>Create or update AgentSkills. Use when designing, structuring, or packaging skills with scripts, references, and assets.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>taskflow</name>
    <description>Use when work should span one or more detached tasks but still behave like one job with a single owner context. TaskFlow is the durable flow substrate under authoring layers like Lobster, ACPX, plugins, or plain code. Keep conditional logic in the caller; use TaskFlow for flow identity, child-task linkage, waiting state, revision-checked mutations, and user-facing emergence.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/skills/taskflow/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>taskflow-inbox-triage</name>
    <description>Example TaskFlow authoring pattern for inbox triage. Use when messages need different treatment based on intent, with some routes notifying immediately, some waiting on outside answers, and others rolling into a later summary.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/skills/taskflow-inbox-triage/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>tavily</name>
    <description>Tavily web search, content extraction, and research tools.</description>
    <location>~/Cursor/openclaw/dist-runtime/extensions/tavily/skills/tavily/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weather</name>
    <description>Get current weather and forecasts via wttr.in or Open-Meteo. Use when: user asks about weather, temperature, or forecasts for any location. NOT for: historical weather data, severe weather alerts, or detailed meteorological analysis. No API key needed.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>wechat-helper</name>
    <description>WeChat management and automation helper. Use when: user asks to open WeChat, check WeChat status, or automate WeChat workflows via AppleScript.</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/wechat-helper/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
  <skill>
    <name>weekly-report</name>
    <description>周报生成与管理技能。根据内部系统文档和数据自动生成结构化周报模板，支持多种业务场景（算法工程、产品运营、技术团队等）。使用当Codex需要：1) 从内部文档系统抓取周报数据，2) 生成标准化周报模板，3) 按照固定格式填充周报内容，4) 为不同团队定制周报格式。支持触发词：生成周报、生成上周周报、生成xxx当周报(如：4月13日)。</description>
    <location>~/.openclaw/skills/weekly-report/SKILL.md</location>
  </skill>
</available_skills>
